name: Banana-brownies, Lo Cal
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Spray a 9-inch square baking pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3. In a bowl, combine flour, cocoa, milk powder, baking soda, and salt.
4. In a food processor, puree the ripe banana, sugar, egg whites, buttermilk, and vanilla extract until smooth.
5. Add the dry ingredients to the food processor and pulse just until blended.
6. Pour the mixture into the prepared pan.
7. Bake for 25 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Cut the brownies into 2-inch squares.
